g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Account entity schema in detail — fields, auth method, notification preferences storage')
sendPrompt('Design the Profile entity — how is it stored, how do multiple accounts link to the same profile ID?')
sendPrompt('How should encrypted medical file storage work — what encryption, where stored, how accessed?')

svg.text: Profile sharing model — symmetric, equal access
Son creates profile → shares ID → sister links same profile → both see identical data, no hierarchy
Notification preferences — per account, per event type
e.g. Sister opts out of 3am reminders · Son enables panic alerts · Parent sets own med reminders only

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Medications data model — fields for manual entry and OCR capture, reminder schedule')
sendPrompt('Design the Allergies and Chronic Conditions model — coded values vs free text, severity levels')
sendPrompt('Design the Telemetry model — what readings, how often, manual vs wearable, trend storage')
sendPrompt('What other data should a profile store — emergency contacts, blood type, insurance, doctors?')
sendPrompt('How should medicine reminders be implemented — push, SMS, local notification, snooze logic?')
sendPrompt('How should appointment reminders work — who creates them, what notification goes to guardians?')
sendPrompt('What other features should this app have — vitals dashboard, document upload, sharing with doctors?')
sendPrompt('Which free AI models have the best context limits for medical summarisation — Gemini Flash, Groq Llama, OpenRouter?')
sendPrompt('What should the basic AI tier include if we only have limited free inference — what is most valuable?')

rect.style: fill:var(--color-background-secondary); stroke:var(--color-border-secondary); stroke-width:0.5;fill:rgb(38, 38, 36);stroke:rgba(222, 220, 209, 0.3);color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:0.5px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the panic button flow end to end — what happens step by step when it is pressed?')
sendPrompt('How should the push → SMS → call cascade work — timing, retry logic, confirmation?')
sendPrompt('SMS and automated call fallback for panic — Twilio, fast2sms, or what service works well in India?')
